concept.title: Customize Cloud-Native Router Helm Chart for Azure Deployment

abstract.shortdesc: Read this topic to learn about the deployment configuration available for the Juniper Cloud-Native Router when deployed on Microsoft Azure Cloud Platform.

conbody.p: You can deploy and operate Juniper Cloud-Native Router in L3 mode on Azure. You configure the deployment mode by editing the appropriate attributes in the values.yaml file prior to deployment.
